basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Project Consultant Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with B.Tech (Civil) with 10 years of experience, B.Tech (Civil) and M.Tech in Hydrology/Hydraulics/DSR/Civil Engineering from CFTI with 6 years of experience, PhD in the relevant field of reservoir sedimentation and management with 4 years of experience qualification can directly attend the interview on 24-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech (Civil) with 10 years of experience, B.Tech (Civil) and M.Tech in Hydrology/Hydraulics/DSR/Civil Engineering from CFTI with 6 years of experience, PhD in the relevant field of reservoir sedimentation and management with 4 years of experience
qualification.details: Project Consultant: B.Tech (Civil) with 10 years of experience Or B.Tech (Civil) and M.Tech in Hydrology/Hydraulics/DSR/Civil Engineering from CFTI with 6 years of experience Or PhD in the relevant field of reservoir sedimentation and management with 4 years of experience. Proven record of conducting research in the field of reservoir sedimentation and management through publications in reputed journals. Experience should be in the relevant field of sedimentation.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Roorkee Project Consultant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview.
Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification.

Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).
Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification.
Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview.
Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities.
Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Consultant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Roorkee Project Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Consultant: B.Tech (Civil) with 10 years of experience Or B.Tech (Civil) and M.Tech in Hydrology/Hydraulics/DSR/Civil Engineering from CFTI with 6 years of experience Or PhD in the relevant field of reservoir sedimentation and management with 4 years of experience. Proven record of conducting research in the field of reservoir sedimentation and management through publications in reputed journals. Experience should be in the relevant field of sedimentation.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Roorkee Project Consultant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee), a premier government institution in India.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment drive is Project Consultant, offering a specialized role within the institute.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Project Consultant?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Consultant position under this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for IIT Roorkee Project Consultant?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Project Consultant post is a Walk-in Interview, requiring direct attendance at the specified venue.

faq.question: Q5. What is the walk-in interview date for Project Consultant?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Consultant position is scheduled for 24 July 2026. Candidates must report on this date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Project Consultant post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Consultant post ranges from Rs. 75,000/- to 2,50,000/- per month, plus HRA, depending on experience and qualifications.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech (Civil) with 10 years of experience, or B.Tech (Civil) and M.Tech in relevant fields with 6 years, or a PhD with 4 years of experience in reservoir sedimentation and management.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this IIT Roorkee Project Consultant recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for Project Consultant at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Consultant position at IIT Roorkee is based solely on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, at the Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee campus.
